response.justification: Nearly two decades of hands-on fullstack work with a strong TypeScript/Node.js/React core, current professional experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, plus demonstrated cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) and database (MongoDB, SQL) depth directly match the role. A deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) fits the quality expectations. Gaps are mostly stack-adjacent: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest/Playwright experience and only limited Java/no Kotlin exposure.
strengths: Extensive fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple product companies
Current, professional AI-agent and MCP development experience — a rare required skill
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and community teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin absent and Java exposure appears dated and limited
Significant portion of recent deep work is in niche DLang rather than the primary stack
